calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Martin Hoffmann, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB.
No appearance by defendant Dymitr Gribanowski, a/k/a Dymitr P. Gribanowski.
Default was entered against defendant on June 23, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 18, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, September 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dymitr Gribanowski, a/k/a Dymitr P. Gribanowski, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $44,181.28.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,584.45.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $479.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $49,245.23.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
